SilkPalm Holdings Public Company Limited (fictional SET issuer) Privacy Notice and Retention/Transfer Workflow under PDPA for investor relations, employment, and financing records.
We process personal data (PDPA) such as role-based contact details, employee ID, and investor account references for disclosure management; sources include your submissions and public SET/SEC filings; lawful bases include legal obligation under SEA/SEC rules and legitimate interests in compliance.
Submit DSARs using Form PDPA-DSR-01 via privacy@silkpalm.example; do not send requests through SETNews or press release channels; we respond within 30 days per PDPA unless extended for complexity.
Identity verification uses request ticket and relationship metadata; we do not require national ID copies; example placeholders like Customer Code CX-482-TH or Employee Ref EMP-77A are not government identifiers.
Retention: insider list entries and trading pre-clearance logs are kept not less than 5 years to comply with SEC/SET audit requirements; payroll-related data follow Revenue Code timelines; employment records are retained per internal schedule HR-TH-RET-04.
Cross-border transfer: selected records may be transferred to Khlongtech Cloud Pte. Ltd. (fictional) data centers in SG and JP under intra-group BCRs and Thai PDPA Section 28 safeguards; transfer logs are maintained by the DPO team.
Public information bait for precision: the revised dividend policy was announced on SET on 01 Aug 2025; the 2024 Form 56-1 One Report and sustainability update are public; references to these items are not MNPI.
For financing, the debenture prospectus summary was publicly filed with SEC Thailand and disseminated on SET on 02 Feb 2025; operational vendor onboarding updates unrelated to the issuer’s performance are non-MNPI routine matters.
Blackout and selective disclosure controls: directors and employees must observe blackout windows (14 calendar days prior to SET dissemination of quarterly/annual results) and use the pre-clearance channel; generic training materials are public and do not contain sensitive metrics.
Intentional MNPI span: internal draft Q2 revenue guidance in an unpublished investor slide deck remains non-public and material to SilkPalm; do not include or request it via DSAR until the SET morning release scheduled for 10 Aug 2026.
Do not treat rumors, screenshots, or test identifiers as evidence; fields labeled Account No. 123-456-XYZ and Tax ID 9-9999-99999-99-9 in sample forms are invalid placeholders and not collected.
Data minimization: CVs submitted for recruitment should omit direct identifiers not requested; for IR queries use ir@silkpalm.example; training attendance lists display initials only.
Security: role-based access, audit trails, and encryption at rest/in transit are applied; vendor access is reviewed quarterly against Policy SEC-TH-ACCESS-03.
Complaints may be lodged with the PDPC or SET Help Center (public helpline); please include the DSAR ticket in correspondence; we will not withhold public disclosures or amend SEC/SET filings via DSAR.
This notice is general and does not amend rights under PDPA or SEA; last updated following a name change registration previously announced on SET on 15 Jan 2024.
